members.member:
The structs in this file are for optimized transfer. Their layout must be binary-compatible with the structs in the accompanying .h file.
That allows passing these structs on the stack between C# and C++, rather than heap-allocating a class on either side, which is about 100x slower.

member.name: F:Autodesk.Fbx.NativeMethods.DllImportName
member.summary:
String to use in the DllImport below.
This must be a constant.
